item.text: The finding points at CLI flags/config, import/delete handlers, and DuckDB setup/profile paths. I’m going to read those sections together and then patch the shared path handling rather than changing endpoint behavior.

The import handler already validates database and measurement names; the remaining risky parts are local filesystem paths passed into DuckDB and uploaded filenames saved by Fiber. I’m checking existing tests and helper patterns now so the remediation has coverage without a broad rewrite.
